chunks.text: IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Special Criminal Bail Application 142 of 2024 Ahmed Nawaz vs. The State For the Applicant: Mr. Zia-ul-Hassan, Advocate Mr. Ahmed Nawaz, Applicant Date of hearing: 01.11.2024 Date of announcement: 01.11.2024 ORDER Agha Faisal, J. Urgency granted. Learned counsel undertakes to place on record certified copies, true translations etc. during the course of the week; application disposed of in terms herein. The applicant seeks protective bail, in respect of F.I.R. No.03/2023 registered on 02.09.2023 before Directorate Post Clearance Audit (South) Karachi, pertaining to offence/s under Section/s 25, 26A, 26B, 32A, read with section 187 of the Customs Act, 1969, subsection (12A), (12B), (14-A), (77ii) of section 156 of Customs Act, 1969. Learned counsel submits that the applicant, claiming to be proprietor of entity mentioned in para-15 of the FIR, has been erroneously nominated, and intends to surrender before the concerned trial Court, however, in order to be enabled in such regard seeks to be admitted to protective bail. In view of the foregoing, and without adverting to the merits of the case1, the applicant is admitted to protective bail from the date hereof till end of Court hours on 07-11-2024 or upon surrender of the applicant before the trial Court, whichever is earlier, subject to furnishing solvent surety in the sum of Rs.50,000/- (Rupees Fifty Thousand only) and a personal recognizance bond, in the like amount, to the satisfaction of the Nazir of this Court. This Special Criminal Bail Application stands disposed of accordingly. JUDGE 1 Mukhtar Awan vs. The State reported as 1990 PCrLJ 617; Sabir Hussain vs.
JUDGE 1 Mukhtar Awan vs. The State reported as 1990 PCrLJ 617; Sabir Hussain vs. The State reported as 1999 MLD 2208.
